name: pulsar-edit-mcp-server
description: This is a Pulsar Editor MCP

mcpServerPort.title: MCP Server Port
mcpServerPort.description: Listen on this port for MCP requests from your LLM client (default chosen to avoid conflicts with common local dev servers)

apiEndpointPrefix.title: OpenAI API Endpoint
apiEndpointPrefix.description: The OpenAI compatible API completions endpoint prefix of your LLM when using the built-in chat - everything before /v1/chat/completions. (Requires Restart)

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: The API key for authenticating requests when using the built-in chat

providerTimeoutMs.title: Provider Timeout (ms)
providerTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for built-in chat requests to the OpenAI-compatible provider before surfacing a retryable timeout error.

chatMaxRetries.title: Chat Max Retries
chatMaxRetries.description: Maximum number of automatic retries for retryable built-in chat failures such as 429, timeout or transient 5xx/network errors.

chatRetryBaseDelayMs.title: Chat Retry Base Delay (ms)
chatRetryBaseDelayMs.description: Base delay used for exponential backoff in the built-in chat after retryable provider errors.

chatRequestMinGapMs.title: Chat Request Minimum Gap (ms)
chatRequestMinGapMs.description: Minimum enforced gap between consecutive built-in chat completion requests to reduce provider saturation during proposal/apply sequences.

chatContextMessageLimit.title: Chat Context User-Turn Limit
chatContextMessageLimit.description: Maximum number of recent user turns retained when building built-in chat provider payloads.

chatToolContentCharLimit.title: Chat Tool Content Limit
chatToolContentCharLimit.description: Maximum characters retained from each tool result message before truncation in provider payloads.
